products.title: American Tourister ABS Hard Trolley 55cm Cabin Size | Combination Lock

review_samples.title: Looks premium, feels premium
review_samples.body: Got a lot of compliments at the airport. The finish is scratch-resistant and still looks brand new after 5 trips. Particularly love the premium build.

review_samples.title: Decent bag for the price
review_samples.body: It's okay for occasional travel. Wheels work fine, zippers are adequate. Nothing extraordinary but does the job for domestic trips.

review_samples.title: Locks are flimsy
review_samples.body: The TSA lock feels very cheap. The combination wheels are stiff and the mechanism doesn't inspire confidence for securing valuables. Main issue was the limited colors in India.

review_samples.title: Average product
review_samples.body: Got this as a replacement for my old bag. It's similar in quality. Not great not bad. Serves its purpose for short trips.

products.title: American Tourister ABS Check-in Bag 65cm | Anti-Scratch | Secure Lock

review_samples.title: Sturdy and spacious
review_samples.body: Used this for 3 international trips now. The shell hasn't cracked, wheels are still smooth, and the TSA lock is a great feature. Worth every rupee. Particularly love the TSA lock.

review_samples.title: Good build quality
review_samples.body: The material is thick and feels premium. Zippers are YKK quality and open/close smoothly. Interior has good pockets for organization. Particularly love the sturdy shell.

review_samples.title: Handle wobbles
review_samples.body: The telescopic handle wobbles and doesn't lock properly at different heights. Gets annoying over long distances. Needs better engineering. Main issue was the limited colors in India.

review_samples.title: Zipper quality is poor
review_samples.body: The zipper got stuck on my second use. Had to really struggle to open it. For this price I expected better quality control. Main issue was the expensive.

products.title: American Tourister Hardshell Carry-On 20" | Lightweight | 360Â° Spinner

review_samples.title: Lightweight and durable
review_samples.body: At just 3.2kg it's one of the lightest hardshell bags I've used. Yet it's very sturdy â€” survived baggage handlers throwing it around! Particularly love the great warranty.

review_samples.title: Great for family trips
review_samples.body: Bought a set of 3. All three have been used extensively for a 15-day Europe trip. Zero issues. Wheels still smooth, zippers fine. Particularly love the great warranty.

review_samples.title: Zipper quality is poor
review_samples.body: The zipper got stuck on my second use. Had to really struggle to open it. For this price I expected better quality control. Main issue was the limited colors in India.

review_samples.title: Poor stitching on interior
review_samples.body: The lining inside is already fraying at the edges. The stitching around the pockets is coming apart. Poor workmanship. Main issue was the limited colors in India.

review_samples.body: The TSA lock feels very cheap. The combination wheels are stiff and the mechanism doesn't inspire confidence for securing valuables. Main issue was the handle loosens.
